name: Research Contract
description: Investigate a topic and return structured findings

context.description: Additional context or constraints for the research

summary.description: Brief summary of the research findings

recommendations.description: Actionable recommendations based on the findings

exampleResponse.summary: React Server Components improve initial page load by rendering on the server, reducing client-side JavaScript.
findings: Server Components eliminate the need for client-side hydration of static content
Bundle size is reduced since server-only dependencies stay on the server
Data fetching moves closer to the data source, reducing waterfall requests
recommendations: Use Server Components for data-heavy pages with minimal interactivity
Keep interactive elements as Client Components composed within Server Components

promptInstruction: Research the topic thoroughly and return structured findings.
